name: MAC-10 | 坐牢
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. A custom paint job of pixies, trapped inside the weapon and eager to escape, has been applied. They have yet to find someone they cannot fool
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器的自定义涂装描绘了几只小精灵被困于武器中并急于脱逃。 他们还没找到那个他们无法糊弄的人
